text_block_list.name: Male Spectator
text_block_list.text:
It's finally time! I've been dying to see Oguri Cap
and Super Creek compete against each other!

text_block_list.name: Female Spectator
text_block_list.text:
But with a lineup like this, it's impossible to tell
whether Oguri, Creek, Inari One, or Mejiro Ardan
will come out on top! The race can't start soon
enough!

text_block_list.name: Male Spectator
text_block_list.text:
Oguriii! Show 'em what you've got! Show 'em
you're the best!

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text:
At long last, Inari One can test her mettle against
both Oguri Cap and Super Creek. Now's her
chance to shake things up and make a name for
herself.

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text:
Come on, Inari One! I know you've got what it
takes to light the Twinkle Series and this
generation ablaze!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Townswoman
text_block_list.text:
Wow, listen to that crowd! I hope Inari's not
feelin' nervous.

text_block_list.name: Townsman
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure she's fine! I'd bet my bottom dollar she'll
run this autumn Tenno Sho as well as she always
does!

text_block_list.name: Racer with Purple Scrunchie
text_block_list.text: Good luck, Inari! We're all rootin' for ya!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho is a make-or-break race
for those seeking to become Umamusume of the
Year, and on top of that, Inari One will be up
against Oguri Cap and Super Creek.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I finally made it...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
If I don't blow Oguri 'n' Creek outta the water
with an overwhelmin' victory today, I'll miss out
on my dream of reachin' the top.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I can't forget that! I have to win here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hesitate, wondering if reassuring her and saying
that I know she'll win will be of any use.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One knows Oguri Cap's true strength better
than I do since she's the one who raced against
her in the Mainichi Okan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't just placate her with shallow platitudes.
There's only one thing I can say, if I'm going to
say anything at all.
choice_data_list: Let's... pull out all the stops!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's embarrassing that's the only encouragement I
can offer, but I say those words with utmost
sincerity in hopes they'll bolster her nerves.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, why do ya look like you're on the verge of
tears?! You're the only reason we've gotten this
far, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
So c'mon. Hold your head up high and be proud,
and I'll do the same too!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'll pull out all the stops jus' like you said 'n' show
'em what I've got! And then...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna beat Oguri and start makin' my way to
the top!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I'll be back, Boss!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(The atmosphere feels so heavy in the paddock.
Wait... am I even breathin'?)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Gah, this is no good. I'm still stuck on what
happened at the Mainichi Okan!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. We haven't faced off in a race since the
Arima Kinen last year.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Creek... You look even stronger than you did
then.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I could say the same about you. I've been really
excited to race against you again...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Especially because I'll be the one winning today.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Not on my watch. I'll be today's victor.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'm such a fool! Just look at how amazing the two
of 'em look standin' next to each other!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(But I gotta beat 'em! And I needa win so
spectacularly, no one'll have any doubt that I'm
the best!)

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Inari.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: ...Hey, Creek. Lookin' good.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Ever since we entered our senior year, I've been
looking forward to the day I'd be able to race
against you. And now it's finally here! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Let's both do our best.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
With both you and Oguri here, I couldn't have
asked for a better autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Neither could I!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Well, I'll see you later.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(I can do it. I've gotta, 'cause Boss 'n' the others
all believe in me!)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(I can do it. I've gotta, 'cause Boss 'n' the others
all believe in me!)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
It's time, Inari One! This is the ultimate showdown
that'll decide my fate!
